goal: Wire event publishing for contribution reversals, penalty waivers, and all lifecycle events

tasks.name: Wire ContributionReversedEvent + PenaltyWaivedEvent publishing
tasks.action: Replace TODO comments with eventPublisher.publishEvent() calls for ContributionReversedEvent in reverseContribution() and PenaltyWaivedEvent in waivePenalty(). Ensure ApplicationEventPublisher is injected.

tasks.name: Wire lifecycle events in sacco-loan
tasks.action: Publish LoanApplicationEvent in applyForLoan (APPLIED), approveLoan (APPROVED), rejectLoan (REJECTED). Publish LoanStatusChangeEvent in closeLoan and any default transition.

tasks.name: Wire lifecycle events in sacco-contribution + sacco-payout
tasks.action: Publish ContributionCreatedEvent in recordContribution() and bulkRecordContributions(). Publish PayoutStatusChangeEvent in createPayout (CREATED) and approvePayout (APPROVED).

commitMessage: feat(event-gl-completeness): wire event publishing for reversals, waivers, and lifecycle
